creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch is ok, but I (or anybody) need to investigate the reason size 
 was changed. I don't have much time now, i'm on a new job and won't have 
 time to deal with ports stuffs for next 2 or 3 weeks.. :-(
